- Rather than genetically modifying the mosquitoes themselves, these programs breed mosquitoes carrying the bacteria and release them into the wild.
- According to reports, approximately 30 million Wolbachia-infected mosquitoes are being released every single week as part of a large-scale program supported.
- the Microsoft co-founder has released hundreds of millions of bacteria-infested mosquitoes into the wild in Colombia.
- Target Malaria launched operations in Burkina Faso in 2012 as part of a broader international effort to deploy gene-editing technologies against malaria-carrying.
